---
name: App Suggestion
about: Suggest a new app to be added to the list.
title: ''
labels: 'app suggestion'
assignees: ''

---

### app name
Write here the name of your app.

### category
Type the category and category file, for example `Browsers` / `apps/browsers.json`.

### package name
Write the Android package name, for example `org.example.app`.

### description
Describe in short the functionality of the app.

### license
Name the app's open-source license.

### source URL
Link the repository with the source code.

### install sources
Link every known install source: F-Droid, IzzyOnDroid, Accrescent, Obtainium-compatible releases, Play Store, or website.

### maintenance notes
Mention whether the app is actively maintained, stale, archived, deprecated, or replaced by a successor.

### privacy/security caveats
List anti-features, trackers, unusual permissions, required network services, or other privacy/security notes.
